sourcesContent: ## Examples Component containing an event button that emits `UserClickedCloseModal` when clicked with the modalId as payload. It has a default slot to customize its contents. ### Basic example The component renders whatever is passed to it in the default slot and closing the modal with modalId `my-modal`. ```vue ``` ## Events A list of events that the component will emit: - `UserClickedCloseModal`: the event is emitted after the user clicks the button. The event payload is the id of the modal that is going to be closed.
